subcodes.first_line: The verses of God, the All-Powerful, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise, have been sent down, and that which lay hidden in knowledge and treasured therein hath been made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نزلت آیات الله المقتدر العلیم الحکیم و ظهر ما کان مکنونا فی العلم و مخزونا
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement
